sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: position size determined by dividing f value (contracts per equity threshold) into percentage allocation of total account equity. Rebalance daily to new total equity. Example: if f=$5,000 per contract and allocation=10%, then contracts = $5,000 / 0.10 = 1 contract per $50,000 total equity. f value is system-specific.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by dividing the f value (contracts per account equity threshold) into a percentage allocation of total account equity.
